text:
| **Demux/routing** | Every event (debug: kind+id+from), first-sight gate (info), duplicate delivery (debug), offline-agent-mention dispatch, orchestration dispatch, spawn-on-mention full decision tree | [...]    - **`src/daemon/server/demux.rs`**
     - `handle_incoming`: replaced `eprintln!` with `tracing::debug!(kind, id, from, "incoming event")`
     - First-sight logic: `tracing::info!` for most kinds, but `tracing::debug!` for kind:30315 status heartbeats (added `is_heartbeat` check)
     - Added offline-agent-mention dispatch log at `tracing::info!`
     - Added orchestration dispatch log at `tracing::info!`
     - `handle_offline_agent_mention`: replaced all `eprintln!` with structured tracing (has_aliveâ†’debug, resumeâ†’info, resume failâ†’warn, not-memberâ†’debug, ordinal provisioningâ†’info, mgmt add_member failâ†’warn, no pathâ†’warn, spawningâ†’info, spawn outcomeâ†’info/warn)
     - `handle_orchestration`: replaced debug-gated and unconditional `eprintln!` with tracing::warn (auth rejection, parent mismatch), tracing::debug (already claimed), tracing::info (identity mint, spawn success), tracing::error (spawn failure)
